title: Grenfell Tower next steps
body: "The government recognises that Grenfell Tower has a deep personal significance to those most affected by the tragedy and that all work at the Grenfell Tower site is sensitive. We are continuing to share information about the Tower, and listen to bereaved families, survivors and residents in the immediate community.   In this community update, we provide information about how the community can speak to us, and what to expect from the next stages as we prepare for work to carefully take down Grenfell Tower. We provide details of how we can support the community to mark the anniversary in June, and pay respects at the site. The update also includes information about health and wellbeing support, and how to get in touch with us.   The content of this update reflects information that has been sent directly to bereaved family members, survivors and residents in the immediate community. "
